scenes.description: MC section with Pavolia Reine, Anya Melfissa, and Kureiji Ollie
MC section with Mori Calliope, Ninomae Ina'nis, and Takanashi Kiara

subtitles.english: Push them away and entertain them, and it'll work

subtitles.original: クラッシュしちゃって
subtitles.english: Crash it

subtitles.original: 今すぐでも 私たちの色に
subtitles.english: Even right now, in our colors

subtitles.original: 染め上げた 世界を見せるよ
subtitles.english: We'll show you a world we've dyed

subtitles.original: 皆様、今年の応援もありがとうですわ！
subtitles.english: Everyone, thank you for your support this year too!

subtitles.original: ホロIDはもっともっと盛り上がるよ！
subtitles.english: HoloID will get even more excited!

subtitles.original: ずっと見ててね！
subtitles.english: Keep watching us!

subtitles.original: 来年もよろしくお願いいたします！
subtitles.english: We look forward to your continued support next year!

subtitles.original: See you next year!
subtitles.english: See you next year!

subtitles.original: 3rd STAGE
subtitles.english: 3rd STAGE

subtitles.original: 皆さん、森カリオペです！
subtitles.english: Everyone, it's Mori Calliope!

subtitles.original: What's up? hololive English Myth coming right at you for a brand new year!
subtitles.english: What's up? hololive English Myth coming right at you for a brand new year!

subtitles.original: 今年すごい盛り上がったね。
subtitles.english: It was really exciting this year.

subtitles.original: 来年もよろしく！
subtitles.english: Looking forward to next year too!

subtitles.original: We're gonna rock the world 10 times harder next year. You in?
subtitles.english: We're gonna rock the world 10 times harder next year. You in?

subtitles.original: Next up, Ina!
subtitles.english: Next up, Ina!

subtitles.original: Wah! Hello everyone! This is Ina!
subtitles.english: Wah! Hello everyone! This is Ina!

subtitles.original: Thank you so much for a really fun 2025!
subtitles.english: Thank you so much for a really fun 2025!

subtitles.original: 今年すっごく楽しかったです！
subtitles.english: This year was so much fun!

subtitles.original: 来年もよろしくお願いしますね！
subtitles.english: Looking forward to next year as well!

subtitles.original: Yeah, let's go!
subtitles.english: Yeah, let's go!

subtitles.original: Next is Kiara! Wah!
subtitles.english: Next is Kiara! Wah!

subtitles.original: キキリキ！小鳥遊キアラです！
subtitles.english: Kikiriki! I'm Takanashi Kiara!

subtitles.original: キアラらしく盛り上げるぞー！
subtitles.english: I'm gonna liven things up in my own Kiara style!

subtitles.english: Dankeschön!

subtitles.original: 2026年もよろしく！
subtitles.english: Looking forward to 2026 too!

subtitles.original: Alright, let's show 'em what we got!
